panels.description: Key metrics for Gemini CLI activity: total messages handled, unique chat sessions, average and P95 response times.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.api_response"
| extend sessionId = tostring(customDimensions["session.id"]),
         dur = tolong(customDimensions["duration_ms"])
| summarize
    ['Messages'] = count(),
    ['Unique Chats'] = dcount(sessionId),
    ['Avg Response (s)'] = round(avg(dur) / 1000.0, 1),
    ['P95 Response (s)'] = round(percentile(dur, 95) / 1000.0, 1)

panels.title: Message Summary

panels.description: LLM token usage summary: total LLM calls, output tokens, cache read tokens, average LLM response time, and stuck session count.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let llm = traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.api_response"
| extend
    output_tokens = tolong(customDimensions["output_token_count"]),
    cache_read = tolong(customDimensions["cached_content_token_count"]),
    dur = tolong(customDimensions["duration_ms"])
| summarize
    ['LLM Calls'] = count(),
    ['Output Tokens'] = sum(output_tokens),
    ['Cache Read Tokens'] = sum(cache_read),
    ['Avg LLM Time (s)'] = round(avg(dur) / 1000.0, 1);
let errors = traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.api_error"
| summarize ['API Errors'] = count();
llm | extend dummy = 1
| join kind=inner (errors | extend dummy = 1) on dummy
| project ['LLM Calls'], ['Output Tokens'], ['Cache Read Tokens'], ['Avg LLM Time (s)'], ['API Errors']

panels.title: LLM & Health Summary

panels.description: Estimated USD cost over the time range using public per-model prices ($/M tokens, input + output + cache_read + cache_write). Anthropic, OpenAI and Gemini families covered; unknown models fall back to a Sonnet-tier default ($3/$15/$0.30/$3.75) so the panel always shows a number. Edit the price map in the query when prices change or to add models.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let price = dynamic({
    "gemini-3-flash-preview": {"i": 0.30, "o": 2.50, "cr": 0.075},
    "gemini-2.5-pro": {"i": 1.25, "o": 10.0, "cr": 0.31},
    "gemini-2.5-flash": {"i": 0.30, "o": 2.50, "cr": 0.075},
    "gemini-2.5-flash-lite": {"i": 0.10, "o": 0.40, "cr": 0.025},
    "gemini-2.0-flash": {"i": 0.10, "o": 0.40, "cr": 0.025},
    "gemini-1.5-pro": {"i": 1.25, "o": 5.0, "cr": 0.31},
    "gemini-1.5-flash": {"i": 0.075, "o": 0.30, "cr": 0.019}
});
let defaultPrice = dynamic({"i": 0.30, "o": 2.50, "cr": 0.075});
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.api_response"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["model"]),
         inp_total = tolong(customDimensions["input_token_count"]),
         outp = tolong(customDimensions["output_token_count"]),
         cr = tolong(customDimensions["cached_content_token_count"])
| extend inp_fresh = iif(inp_total > cr, inp_total - cr, tolong(0))
| extend p = iif(isnotnull(price[model]), price[model], defaultPrice)
| extend usd = (inp_fresh*todouble(p.i) + outp*todouble(p.o) + cr*todouble(p.cr)) / 1000000.0
| summarize ['Cost (USD)'] = round(sum(usd), 2)

panels.title: Estimated Cost (USD)

panels.description: cache_read tokens / (input + cache_read). High = caching is doing the heavy lifting. A drop here is the canary for a caching regression.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.api_response"
| extend inp = tolong(customDimensions["input_token_count"]),
         cr  = tolong(customDimensions["cached_content_token_count"])
| summarize denom = sum(inp), num = sum(cr)
| extend ['Cache Hit %'] = iif(denom > 0, round(100.0 * num / denom, 2), 0.0)
| project ['Cache Hit %']

panels.title: Cache Hit %

panels.description: Time-bucketed view of API calls and 429/error responses. Replaces flat error counts with a trend that exposes burst-quota patterns.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) in ("gemini_cli.api_response","gemini_cli.api_error")
| extend status = tostring(customDimensions["status_code"]),
         ev = tostring(customDimensions["event.name"])
| extend bucket = iif(ev=="gemini_cli.api_error", strcat("err_", status), "ok_200")
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, $__interval), bucket
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: LLM Calls & Errors by Status

panels.description: Trend of API response latency percentiles, more actionable than a flat 7-day average.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.api_response"
| extend dur = tolong(customDimensions["duration_ms"])
| summarize p50=percentile(dur,50), p95=percentile(dur,95), p99=percentile(dur,99) by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: LLM Latency p50 / p95 / p99

panels.description: Histogram of Google API quotaResetDelay values from 429 errors, showing how often backoff bites and for how long.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.api_error"
| extend err = tostring(customDimensions["error.message"])
| extend reset_s = todouble(extract(@'quotaResetDelay\"\s*:\s*\"(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)s', 1, err))
| where isnotnull(reset_s)
| summarize Count=count() by ResetDelaySeconds=tostring(bin(reset_s, 1.0))
| order by ResetDelaySeconds asc

panels.title: Quota Reset Delay Distribution (429s)

panels.description: Per-tool call volume, failure %, and p95/avg duration. Distinguishes native vs MCP server tools.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.tool_call"
| extend func = tostring(customDimensions["function_name"]),
         server = tostring(customDimensions["mcp_server_name"]),
         tool_type = tostring(customDimensions["tool_type"]),
         success = tostring(customDimensions["success"]),
         dur = tolong(customDimensions["duration_ms"])
| extend server = iif(server=="", "native", server)
| summarize calls=count(),
            failures=countif(success=="false"),
            fail_pct=round(100.0*countif(success=="false")/count(), 1),
            p95_ms=round(percentile(dur,95),0),
            avg_ms=round(avg(dur),0)
            by func, server, tool_type
| order by calls desc

panels.title: Tools — Calls, Failures, Latency

panels.description: p95 and average latency for native CLI tools versus MCP-server tools.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let tcalls = traces
    | where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
    | where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.tool_call"
    | extend tt = tostring(customDimensions["tool_type"]), dur = tolong(customDimensions["duration_ms"]);
tcalls
| where tt == "native"
| summarize ['Native p95']=round(percentile(dur,95),0), ['Native avg']=round(avg(dur),0)
| extend dummy=1
| join kind=inner (
    tcalls
    | where tt == "mcp"
    | summarize ['MCP p95']=round(percentile(dur,95),0), ['MCP avg']=round(avg(dur),0)
    | extend dummy=1
) on dummy
| project ['Native p95'], ['MCP p95'], ['Native avg'], ['MCP avg']

panels.title: Native vs MCP Tool Latency

panels.description: Distribution of accept / auto_accept / none(yolo) decisions on tool calls. Shows how often the user is being prompted vs running unattended.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.tool_call"
| extend d = tostring(customDimensions["decision"])
| extend d = iif(d=="", "none/yolo", d)
| summarize Count=count() by Decision=d
| order by Count desc

panels.title: Tool Approval Decisions

panels.description: One row per chat session: prompts, LLM calls, errors, tool calls, duration.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| extend ev = tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]),
         sid = tostring(customDimensions["session.id"]),
         email = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"])
| where sid != ""
| summarize prompts=countif(ev=="gemini_cli.user_prompt"),
            llm_calls=countif(ev=="gemini_cli.api_response"),
            errors=countif(ev=="gemini_cli.api_error"),
            tools=countif(ev=="gemini_cli.tool_call"),
            user=any(email),
            started=min(timestamp), ended=max(timestamp)
            by sid
| extend duration_min = round(todouble(datetime_diff('second', ended, started))/60.0, 1)
| project session=substring(sid,0,8), user, prompts, llm_calls, errors, tools, duration_min, started
| order by started desc
| take 25

panels.title: Sessions

panels.description: Active users by API call volume and total token usage.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.api_response"
| extend email = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"]),
         host  = tostring(customDimensions["host.name"]),
         outp = tolong(customDimensions["output_token_count"]),
         inp  = tolong(customDimensions["input_token_count"]),
         cr   = tolong(customDimensions["cached_content_token_count"])
| summarize calls=count(), output_tokens=sum(outp), input_tokens=sum(inp), cache_tokens=sum(cr) by email, host
| order by calls desc

panels.title: Top Users / Hosts

panels.description: Same pricing as the headline cost stat, but bucketed per session — surfaces runaway loops.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let price = dynamic({
    "gemini-3-flash-preview": {"i": 0.30, "o": 2.50, "cr": 0.075},
    "gemini-2.5-pro": {"i": 1.25, "o": 10.0, "cr": 0.31},
    "gemini-2.5-flash": {"i": 0.30, "o": 2.50, "cr": 0.075},
    "gemini-2.5-flash-lite": {"i": 0.10, "o": 0.40, "cr": 0.025},
    "gemini-2.0-flash": {"i": 0.10, "o": 0.40, "cr": 0.025},
    "gemini-1.5-pro": {"i": 1.25, "o": 5.0, "cr": 0.31},
    "gemini-1.5-flash": {"i": 0.075, "o": 0.30, "cr": 0.019}
});
let dft = dynamic({"i": 0.30, "o": 2.50, "cr": 0.075});
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.api_response"
| extend sid = tostring(customDimensions["session.id"]),
         m = tostring(customDimensions["model"]),
         inp = tolong(customDimensions["input_token_count"]),
         cr = tolong(customDimensions["cached_content_token_count"]),
         outp = tolong(customDimensions["output_token_count"])
| extend inp_fresh = iif(inp>cr, inp-cr, tolong(0))
| extend p = iif(isnotnull(price[m]), price[m], dft)
| extend usd = (inp_fresh*todouble(p.i) + outp*todouble(p.o) + cr*todouble(p.cr))/1000000.0
| summarize calls=count(), tokens=sum(inp+outp), cost_usd=round(sum(usd),4) by session=substring(sid,0,8)
| order by cost_usd desc
| take 20

panels.title: Cost Per Session (Top)

panels.description: Stacked bars: input_fresh, cache_read, output, thoughts, tool tokens. Existing dashboard hides thoughts tokens, which can dominate Gemini-3 responses.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.api_response"
| extend
    inp = tolong(customDimensions["input_token_count"]),
    cr  = tolong(customDimensions["cached_content_token_count"]),
    outp = tolong(customDimensions["output_token_count"]),
    thoughts = tolong(customDimensions["thoughts_token_count"]),
    tool_t = tolong(customDimensions["tool_token_count"])
| extend inp_fresh = iif(inp > cr, inp - cr, tolong(0))
| summarize input_fresh=sum(inp_fresh), cache_read=sum(cr),
            output=sum(outp), thoughts=sum(thoughts), tool=sum(tool_t)
            by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Token Composition Over Time

panels.description: CLI startup phases unpacked from gemini_cli.startup_stats.phases JSON. Useful for spotting slow auth or tool discovery.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.startup_stats"
| extend phases = parse_json(tostring(customDimensions["phases"]))
| mv-expand p = phases
| extend phase = tostring(p.name), dur = tolong(p.duration_ms)
| summarize avg_ms=round(avg(dur),0), p95_ms=round(percentile(dur,95),0) by phase
| order by avg_ms desc

panels.title: Startup Phases (avg ms)

panels.description: Lines read by source language. Indicates which workspaces the agent is exploring.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "gemini-cli"
| where tostring(customDimensions["event.name"]) == "gemini_cli.file_operation"
| extend lang = tostring(customDimensions["programming_language"]),
         lines = tolong(customDimensions["lines"])
| extend lang = iif(lang=="", "unknown", lang)
| summarize total_lines=sum(lines), ops=count() by lang
| order by total_lines desc

panels.title: File Reads by Language

title: Gemini CLI
description: Gemini CLI usage analytics: tracks sessions, user prompts, model API requests, token consumption, tool call activity, latency, errors, file operations, and per-model breakdowns. Data sourced from Application Insights via OpenTelemetry.
